# Rogue2.Official Message Reference Data

This directory contains message files copied from Rogue2.Official for reference only.

- Source: https://github.com/suzukiiichiro/Rogue2.Official
- Source commit: `334315ea068e7ae8605ff9be5d6e04b0658cd330`
- Files copied: `mesg_E`, `mesg_J`, `COPYING`
- Encoding note: `mesg_E` and `COPYING` were converted from EUC-JP to UTF-8 when copied here. `mesg_J` was already UTF-8 in the source checkout.

These files are not the game-mechanics authority for Pyxel Rogue. Rogue 5.4.4 C source remains the authority for behavior, probabilities, turn consumption, combat, item effects, traps, hidden features, and monster AI.

Use these files as Japanese wording and message-structure reference data when gradually moving Pyxel Rogue text into `TextCatalog`.
